description_long: This is a rectangular wooden box with a natural light wood finish, featuring printed and stamped graphics on its surfaces. The front and back sides display a vibrant illustration of two red roses with green leaves, accompanied by the bold label 'ROSE TEA' and additional text indicating it contains premium Ceylon tea. The shorter ends of the box are stamped with a circular seal reading 'GOOD TEA TASTES BETTER' and information about the contents: 25 string & tag tea bags, net weight 50g. The top of the box is adorned with a red-bordered label that repeats the tea branding and product details. The box appears to be a product package, likely used for retail or gifting, and is constructed from thin, lightweight wood. The overall appearance is vintage and decorative, with a focus on the rose motif and tea branding.
description: A rectangular wooden box with red rose illustrations and 'ROSE TEA' branding, featuring detailed product labels and a natural wood finish.
description_view_0: The short end of the box shows a circular 'GOOD TEA TASTES BETTER' seal and product details, with the top label partially visible.
description_view_1: The long side displays two large red roses, the 'ROSE TEA' label, and detailed product information in black text.
description_view_2: The opposite short end mirrors view 0, showing the same circular seal and product details.
description_view_3: The long side, similar to view 1, features the rose illustrations and 'ROSE TEA' branding, with the top label slightly more visible.
